prompt: A centered studio portrait of a fluffy ragdoll kitten sitting upright and facing directly toward the camera on a seamless pure white background. The kitten has long, soft, luxurious fur with a mostly white coat, subtle cool gray shading on the sides of the body, darker gray ears, a gray mask around the eyes and upper face, and a dark gray fluffy tail curled around the front-left side. Its eyes are large, round, and vivid blue, with a small pink nose, delicate whiskers, and a calm, innocent expression. Show the full body from ears to paws, perfectly centered and symmetrical, with both front paws close together and visible. Lighting is high-key, soft, and even, with minimal shadows, crisp fur detail, gentle depth, and a clean premium pet-photography look. Ultra-realistic, sharp focus on the face, smooth white negative space, no props, no text, no collar, no background elements.
